Building: only for Quests. You can find Sociology Classroom, a workshop,
Yomenaido Bookstore, Daidara Metalworks, and Shiroku Store. You also can
find a mailbox here which has its use later. Marukyu Tofu will be important
later in the story. Bus stop is here as well to activate a Link. Velvet
Room (or door) is located between Daidara and Yomenaido. Oh, and MOEL gas
has its functions. Chinese Diner Aiya which will increase one or more of
your Stats, the Town Bulletin Board for you to get part-time jobs and some
Links, Souzai Daigaku that sells some food needed to clear up Quest/Link,
and the Tatsuhime Shrine for Link activation and PA for other Links. Other
useless facilities are Marutake Hobby Shop, Barber, Electronics Store,
